{"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 75, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Fireblocking/draftstopping penetration sealed with foam where a fire-rated sealant is required.", "Foam is not an approved fire-rated sealant and will not maintain the required fire-resistance rating of the assembly."], "actions": ["Remove non-rated foam from the penetration.", "Install code-compliant fire-rated sealant per IRC R302 and manufacturer instructions.", "Verify sealant is labeled/listed for the intended fire-resistance-rated assembly."], "rationale": "IRC R302 requires fireblocking and draftstopping to impede the spread of fire and smoke through concealed spaces and penetrations. A non-rated foam sealant does not provide the required fire-resistance rating, creating a life-safety hazard and code violation. The work must fail until corrected.", "references": ["IRC R302"]}
